subject: Alien metabolism: proof-bound income hypotheses rather than self-reported commercial progress

spirals.measure: A market thesis requires a buyer, bounded problem and deliverable, live local proof, external test, due date, and kill condition before it can be armed.
A proof packet binds exact local artifacts to short SHA-256 hashes; PAID is refused without receipt:<existing-local-file>.
Three distinct hypotheses are armed through 2026-08-09: agent assurance, evidence-gate implementation, and bounded discovery; every one remains unvalidated.

current_truth: paid=0 and demand=unmeasured. The packets establish inspectable scope, not customer demand, payment, safety certification, or a discovery result.
next_kill: Narrow or retire any thesis without a qualifying external signal by 2026-08-09. Reject any state transition that represents payment without an append-only signal and live local receipt pointer.
